Part 01 — The Stability Framework

Why Most Agencies Are One
Bad Month Away From Crisis

Think of your patient acquisition like a table. Most agencies only have one or two legs. When one wobbles, the whole thing falls. We build you four.

Most Agencies
The 2-Leg Table
Unstable. One bad referral month = panic.
Word of Mouth Buying Leads Missing Missing
⚠ One dry referral month and growth stalls — or reverses.
With Patients Pipeline
The 4-Leg Table
Built to scale. No single point of failure.
New Leads (Ads) WOM (Referrals) Organic (Reviews) Renew (Reactivation)
✓ If any one channel slows, the other three carry the load.
The 4 Legs — What Each One Does

Every leg runs simultaneously. Together they create compounding, predictable growth.

📣

New Leads — Meta Ads

Two campaigns running 24/7 — seniors and adult children. Paid, predictable, and fully optimized by us.

~21 patients/mo
🔊

WOM — Incentivized Referral System

Automated referral asks sent to happy patients. $100 gift card per confirmed patient. Word-of-mouth on autopilot.

3–10 patients/mo
⭐

Organic — Google Review System

5-star reviews auto-posted to Google My Business. Builds trust and inbound organically. Compounds every month.

Compounds monthly
🔄

Renew — Reactivation Campaign

Past leads, cold inquiries, and former clients reactivated through automated sequences. Zero extra ad spend.

5–15 patients
Part 02 — Full System A–Z

Every Lead. Every Time.
On Repeat.

This is the exact journey every single inquiry takes — from scrolling their feed to referring their friends. Fully automated. Infinitely repeatable.

🔄 Every new lead restarts the cycle

Step 01 Day 0

Lead Sees Your Ad

A senior or their adult child is scrolling Facebook or Instagram. Your agency's ad stops the scroll. Your irresistible offer speaks directly to them.

Meta Ads — Campaign 1 & 2
📍 Geo-targeted by market 🎯 Emotionally driven creative
Step 02 Seconds Later

Double Opt-In Form

They fill out the lead form. On the final page: on the final confirmation page they see a "Book My Free Call" button to schedule directly — locking in the appointment before they leave the form.

Form + Double Opt-In
✓ Pre-qualifies lead on form 📅 Books directly to your calendar
Step 03 < 60 Seconds

AI Engages & Qualifies

Tap the button → AI is already in conversation before they put the phone down. Don't tap → AI reaches out at 2 min automatically. Fully qualifies and hands off to your intake team.

Conversational AI — 24/7
Today 2:14 PM
CARE
Hi! Thanks for reaching out to [Agency Name] 👋 I'm here to help match you with the perfect caregiver. Quick question — is care for yourself or a loved one?
My mom, she's 78
Got it! What zip code is she located in? I want to make sure we have a caregiver available in her area 📍
✓ Qualifying automatically — name, zip, care needs, schedule
Step 04 Days 1–7

Applied, Onboarded & Starts Care

Your intake team receives a fully qualified lead with all info collected. They close, onboard, and match with a caregiver. The system logs them and starts the post-care automation clock.

Intake Team — CRM Tracked
🧑‍⚕️ New Patient — CRM Active
Name
Dorothy M.
Zip Code
32801
Source
Meta Ad → AI
Care Start
Apr 12, 2026
✓ Review request scheduled: Apr 19
Step 05 1 Week After Start

Smart Review Collection

4–5 Stars: Auto-published to Google My Business instantly. 3 Stars or Below: Never published — sent directly to you to personally reach out and save the patient.

Automated Review System
✅ 5-Star → Google
Hi Dorothy! How is your mom enjoying her care with us? We'd love your honest feedback ⭐
She absolutely loves her caregiver! 5 stars easily 😊
✓ Review published to Google My Business
⚠ Low Star → You Only
Hi Robert! How's your father's care going so far?
Honestly not great, the caregiver was late twice
⚠ Alert sent to manager — not published
Step 06 24 Hrs After Good Review

Incentivized Referral — $100

24 hours after a good review, the referral ask goes out automatically. $100 gift card per confirmed new patient. Only paid once they start services — you're trading $100 for a pre-sold referral.

Referral Incentive System
Automated Referral Message
Dorothy, so glad your mom is loving her care! 🎉 Quick question — do you know anyone else who might need a trusted caregiver?
Actually yes, my neighbor's family is looking!
Amazing! If they start care with us, we'll send you a $100 gift card as a thank-you 🎁 Want me to send you a link to share?
Yes please! That's so generous
✓ Referral link sent — tracking active
Part 03 — Live Ads Manager Proof

Industry Average CPL: $40+.
Our Clients: Under $15.

These aren't projections or estimates. These are live ads manager screenshots from active client accounts right now.

What Everyone Else Pays   Industry Average
$40+

Cost per home care lead on Meta. What agencies running their own ads — or working with generalist agencies — typically pay.

Patients Pipeline Average   ✓ Our Clients
<$20

Every single client we run is under $20 CPL for qualified home care leads. Some as low as $6.97. You get 2–3× more leads for the same budget.

On a $4,000/month ad budget: at $40 CPL you get 100 leads. At our <$20 CPL you get 267+ leads. Same spend. 2.5× more patients.

3× the leads.  Same budget.

Part 06 — The 10-Day Fast Start

Day 1 to Full System Live
in 10 Days Flat.

From the moment you sign, everything is built before a single dollar goes to ads. Here's exactly what happens and when.

✍️
Day 1
Signing, Payment & Onboarding
Agreement signed, payment processed, work begins same day. CRM access provisioned and your client intake form is sent so we understand your agency inside and out.
Service agreement executed GoHighLevel CRM provisioned Agency intake form sent
💎
Days 2–5
Building Your Irresistible Offer
We study your agency's unique advantages and craft a single irresistible offer that packages everything you have into one compelling reason to choose you over every other agency in your market.
Market research Competitor analysis Core offer built Ad copy drafted
⚡
Days 5–8
Reactivation Campaign — Instant Traction
Before a single ad runs, we turn your existing database into immediate revenue. Past clients, cold leads, and old inquiries become renewed clients, 5-star reviews, or referrals — your choice.
Database imported Sequences activated Revenue before ads launch
⚙️
Days 5–8
CRM Build-Out & Meta Campaign Setup
While reactivation runs, we build your complete CRM and launch both Meta campaigns — one targeting seniors, one targeting adult children. Congruent creative, different targeting and copy.
Full GHL pipeline built AI conversation activated 2 Meta campaigns ready Lead form + double opt-in live
🎓
Day 9
Review & Training Meeting
We walk you and your team through everything on a Google Meet. No black boxes — by the end of this call your team knows exactly what's happening and what they need to do once we go live.
